title: Emissive AE2
description: Makes Applied Energistics stuff that should glow do the glow-y things
body:
Makes Applied Energistics stuff that should glow do the glow-y things. Continuity is required to enable emissives.

Also supports AE2 Things, applied mekanistics, and applied botanics.

![Blocks](https://i.imgur.com/VyUMkPt.png)

![Items](https://i.imgur.com/4e4y0Rb.png)

![Cell Charge States](https://i.imgur.com/T6eNCwp.png)
